name: Italian Sausage Fettucine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and rinse in hot water.
2. Make a white sauce with the 2 tablespoons butter, flour, and milk. Set aside.
3. In a frying pan, squeeze the meat out of the sausage casings and fry until cooked through.
4. Add onions and continue cooking until onions are translucent.
5. Add garlic powder, parsley flakes, salt, and cayenne to the sausage mixture. Mix thoroughly.
6. Simmer the meat mixture with the white sauce in the frying pan while the fettuccine is cooking.
7. Serve by ladling the meat and sauce mixture over hot fettucine.
